title: kayea elmeri
intro: Kayea elmeri, also known as Elmer's Kayea, is a plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Kayea elmeri are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, including wounds and ulcers. Kayea elmeri is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used to make a paste or ointment for topical application.
